title: SQL module truncates DECIMALS when passing integers to MAL module
key_bug_features: Passing integers to MAL module truncates DECIMALS
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10,2), description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 12.34, 'First entry');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (2, 56.78, 'Second entry');
SELECT truncode(value, 0) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT truncode(12, 0) AS truncated_value, truncode(NULL, 0) AS null_truncation;
